title: Add M1 benchmark suite and long run invariants
summary: Add the M1 benchmark suite, baseline comparisons, long-run invariant checks and CI reporting for map dirty rebuilds, pathing, work offers, reservations and hauling/building.
acceptance: Benchmarks cover map dirty rebuild, spatial index, 100 paths, 10k logistics, reservations and hauling/building long run
Long run checks cover reservation leaks, stale entity references, negative resources, queue growth, save round trip and hash divergence
Baseline updates are explicit artifacts with 10 percent warning and 20 percent blocking thresholds preserved
Reports include Node, pnpm, OS, CPU, commit and scenario seed metadata

history.details: Added the M1 long-run benchmark suite, invariant gate, benchmark environment metadata, explicit map-dirty baseline hash refresh, and the headless CLI forwarded-argument regression fix; required checks passed.

changes_requested: High: m1-invariants/benchmark mark 100000-tick long-run stable from scripted terminal state; they do not execute or sample the 2401..100000 idle window, queue growth, or stale entity references.

Addressed reviewer finding: M1 long-run evidence now samples idle window from tick 2401 through 100000; benchmark artifact includes idle sample/no-growth/no-stale-reference invariants; required checks pass.

verified: Previous High finding resolved: idle-window samples cover tick 2401 through 100000, longRunStable depends on hash/no-growth/no-stale-reference evidence, benchmark artifact includes idle invariants; key checks pass.

review.summary: Previous High finding resolved: idle-window samples cover tick 2401 through 100000, longRunStable depends on hash/no-growth/no-stale-reference evidence, benchmark artifact includes idle invariants; key checks pass.
